hero.name: Alpha Jedidia R.
hero.title: UX / UI Designer & Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: I design and build digital solutions that are useful, simple, and user-centered.

about.heading: About me
about.p1: Software Engineer with a strong focus on UX / UI Design. I create digital solutions that are useful, simple, and user-centered.
about.p2: I combine design, business, and technology to build clear, efficient, and lasting products. My approach starts with understanding users and translating their needs into intuitive experiences.
about.p3: Currently pursuing an Engineering degree in Software Engineering & Databases at the École Nationale d'Informatique.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my work across web, mobile, desktop, and design.

diaspora-platform.title: Diaspora Platform
diaspora-platform.description: Intuitive platform for the Malagasy diaspora, focused on a smooth user experience and modern design, built with React and Django REST Framework.

hotelle.title: Hot'elle
hotelle.description: Hotel room reservation system handling room availability, customer management, automated email notifications, and PDF receipt generation.

inventory-management.title: Inventory Management
inventory-management.description: Backend Web API for managing inventory and stock levels, with real-time updates, stock movement history, and low stock alerts.

ultimatepay.title: UltimatePay
ultimatepay.description: Modern payment platform providing secure and seamless online payment APIs and a mobile application.

sales-audit.title: Sales Audit System
sales-audit.description: JavaFX desktop application using PostgreSQL triggers to supervise and audit product sales with full traceability.

paperstorm.title: Paperstorm
paperstorm.description: High-performance batch document generation service capable of processing 1000+ documents in parallel, with resilience, monitoring, and full observability.

bible-sermon.title: Bible for Sermon
bible-sermon.description: Mobile app allowing offline download of multiple Bible versions in 7+ languages, with fast full-text search using FTS5.

cashpointer.title: CashPointer
cashpointer.description: Mobile application for cashpoint owners in Madagascar, designed with a deep user research phase to apply user-centered design principles.

ultimatepay-logo.title: UltimatePay Logo
ultimatepay-logo.description: Logo design and visual identity creation for the UltimatePay payment platform.

backoffice-cashpointer.title: BackOffice CashPointer
backoffice-cashpointer.description: Admin dashboard for the CashPointer application, enabling tracking of all devices and subscription management.

gsb-rms.title: GSB — RMS SaaS
gsb-rms.description: User-centered design of a Recruitment Management System SaaS, translating business needs into clear, actionable experiences in close collaboration with clients and technical teams.

mvp-izolearn.title: MVP IzoLearn
mvp-izolearn.description: MVP design for a recruitment SaaS platform allowing candidates to build profiles and companies to find the best match for open positions.

ai-test-tool.title: AI Technical Test Tool
ai-test-tool.description: SaaS tool allowing companies to run internal technical assessments and invite candidates, with an AI that validates results and identifies the best candidates.

ux-optimization.title: UX Optimization — Complex App
ux-optimization.description: UX redesign of a complex application with multiple nested menus, resulting in significantly improved user satisfaction.

agri-toky.title: Agri-Toky
agri-toky.description: Mobile app for Malagasy farmers, designed with Human-Centered Design to remain accessible even for users with limited reading ability.

izolearn-v0.title: IzoLearn V0
izolearn-v0.description: Involved from ideation to development of the IzoLearn e-learning platform as the lead designer.

ounyah.title: Ounyah
ounyah.description: UI/UX design and architecture for an audiobook streaming mobile application.

init-logo.title: inIT Logo
init-logo.description: Logo creation for the tech company inIT.

qr-poster.title: QR Poster Campaign
qr-poster.description: Design of advertising posters for a printing service, allowing users to access content via QR codes placed across the city.

ariary-market.title: Ariary Market
ariary-market.description: Mobile e-commerce app design focused on simplicity and ease of navigation.

survey-redesign.title: Survey Redesign
survey-redesign.description: UX redesign of a daily long survey, resulting in significant time savings for end users after the redesign.

online-print.title: Online Print Service
online-print.description: Design of an online printing service with a focus on usability for all ages, from product selection to final order.
